title: synth_xilinx creates too many RAMB18E1 instances

features.name: true dual_port ram with asymmetric read write ports
features.description: Code should include a True Dual-Port RAM where one port performs write + read from write address while the other port reads from a separate address, both on the same clock edge

features.name: memory with width depth exactly filling one ram primitive
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array memory where width times depth exactly equals the capacity of one block RAM primitive (e.g., 18 bits x 1024 depth = 18K bits = 1 RAMB18E1)
